title: A round white UFO spotted in Bela Vista-SP [1999]
excerpt: DEC 16th, 1999. Time: 03h50 am. Duration: 20 minutes. Two witnesses in the city of Bela Vista, State of São Paulo, spotted a round white UFO with red and green edges. The objetc was “bigger than a big plane”, and also round in shape but with part of its body in a triangular form. The […]
text_preview:
DEC 16th, 1999. Time: 03h50 am. Duration: 20 minutes. Two witnesses in the city of Bela Vista, State of São Paulo, spotted a round white UFO with red and green edges. The objetc was “bigger than a big plane”, and also round in shape but with part of its body in a triangular form. The two observers were using binoculars and saw the UFO about 5 km away from them, in favorable weather conditions for sky observation.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.566. “Avistam
summary: Two binocular-equipped witnesses in Bela Vista, SP observed a large round white UFO with red and green edges that showed a partial triangular form, lasting 20 minutes.
